Class EnumClassDeclaration

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration.JavaDeclaration
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration.TypeDeclaration
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration.ClassDeclaration
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration.EnumClassDeclaration
All Implemented Interfaces:
ClassType, ClassTypeContainer, Member, ProgramModelElement, Type, Declaration, MemberDeclaration, TypeDeclarationContainer, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, ScopeDefiningElement, SourceElement, Statement, TypeScope, VariableScope, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, SyntaxElement
public class EnumClassDeclaration extends ClassDeclaration
This class is used for wrapping an enum into a standard class type.

In addition the programvariables that represent enum constants are memorized. Thus this class is able to have queries on the enum constants.

Since:
2006-12-10

  • Constructor Details

    • EnumClassDeclaration

      public EnumClassDeclaration(ExtList children, ProgramElementName fullName, boolean isLibrary, List<EnumConstantDeclaration> enumConstantDeclarations)
      create a new EnumClassDeclaration that describes an enum defintion. It merely wraps a ClassDeclaration but has memory about which fields have been declared as enum constants.
      Parameters:
      children - children in the ast (members)
      fullName - of the class/enum
      isLibrary - see class constructor
      enumConstantDeclarations - the declarations for the enum constants

  • Method Details

    • getNumberOfConstants

      public int getNumberOfConstants()
      get the number of defined enum constants in this type.
      Returns:
      the number of defined enum constants in this type

    • isEnumConstant

      public static boolean isEnumConstant(IProgramVariable attribute)
      check whether a PV is an enum constant of any enum type.
      Parameters:
      attribute - ProgramVariable to check.
      Returns:
      true iff attribute is an enum constant.

    • indexOf

      public static int indexOf(ProgramVariable attribute)
